title: Show Group Title instead of Item Text in Calendar View
excerpt:
Hi, 
I have a Calendar View: 
  
You see that each day has an “Item #” and is colored by a Group Titles. 
Blue Items are “Group Title ONE” 
I would like to show on those days not the “Item #”, but the Group Title itself,…

posts.author: arthur.a (Arthur)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I have a Calendar View:

image1420×725 27.6 KB

You see that each day has an “Item #” and is colored by a Group Titles.
Blue Items are “Group Title ONE”
I would like to show on those days not the “Item #”, but the Group Title itself, so instead of having on each day “Item #”, I will see “Group Title ONE” or “Group Title whatever”

image1420×725 27.6 KB

Can you please guide me how I can achieve this?
Maybe using Integration APIs? an App?

Thank you very much,
Arthur.
